mapper.sql: id, name, category, location, found_time, finder_contact, description, image_path, status, claimer, claim_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE lost_item SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, location = #{location}, found_time = #{foundTime}, finder_contact = #{finderContact}, description = #{description}, image_path = #{imagePath}, status = #{status}, claimer = #{claimer}, claim_time = #{claimTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM lost_item
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
AND category LIKE '%' || #{category} || '%'
AND location LIKE '%' || #{location} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC, updated_at DESC
